test_cases.title: Valid Blood Pressure Reading
test_cases.steps: 1. Turn on the device, 2. Place the cuff on the upper arm, 3. Press the start button, 4. Wait for the measurement to complete
test_cases.expected_result: The device displays a valid systolic, diastolic, and pulse rate reading within the normal range

test_cases.title: Multiple User Profiles
test_cases.steps: 1. Create two user profiles, 2. Take a blood pressure reading for each profile, 3. Switch between profiles and verify readings
test_cases.expected_result: The device stores and displays readings for each user profile correctly, with up to 200 readings per profile

test_cases.title: Data Storage Capacity
test_cases.steps: 1. Take 201 blood pressure readings for a single user profile, 2. Verify the oldest reading is deleted, 3. Check the device's memory
test_cases.expected_result: The device stores up to 200 readings and automatically deletes the oldest reading when the 201st reading is taken

test_cases.title: Error Handling - Incorrect Cuff Placement
test_cases.steps: 1. Place the cuff incorrectly on the upper arm, 2. Press the start button, 3. Verify error message
test_cases.expected_result: The device displays an error message indicating incorrect cuff placement and does not take a reading

test_cases.title: Power-On Self-Test
test_cases.steps: 1. Turn on the device, 2. Wait for the self-test to complete, 3. Verify all functions are operational
test_cases.expected_result: The device completes the self-test successfully and all functions are operational
